evidence.detail: Instagram engagement rate of 0.54% (628 avg likes + comments / 116,728 followers) falls within expected range for mid-tier influencers (50-200K followers: 1-2%)
fakeInfluencerScore of 0.0 indicates no signs of fake follower purchases or artificial engagement manipulation
Following 1,113 accounts with 116,728 followers (ratio: 104.9) shows typical influencer behavior, not mass-following patterns
670 posts over established account timeframe with consistent aviation/fitness/faith themes demonstrates authentic long-term content creation
TikTok videos show 2.4-3M views with 97K-203K likes, indicating genuine audience engagement across platforms that aligns with Instagram following
Instagram posts show 6-62 comments with engagement from verified accounts and authentic conversations, not generic bot responses
Instagram verified badge and partnerships with legitimate brands (Under Armour, Saucony, HyperNatural) indicate platform recognition of authenticity
Recent posts show consistent like-to-comment ratios (408:38, 224:6, 865:39) without suspicious spikes suggesting purchased engagement
